about.label: Who we are
about.intro: Cartago Motors is your trusted partner for acquiring and exporting premium vehicles from Europe to the Maghreb.
about.storyTitle: Born from a passion for premium cars
about.storyP1: Cartago Motors was born from a simple observation: importing a premium vehicle from Europe to the Maghreb was too complex, too opaque, and too risky.
about.storyP2: We built a dedicated structure to simplify every step: vehicle sourcing, technical inspection, document management, customs clearance and final delivery.
about.storyP3: Today, our network covers Tunisia, Algeria and Morocco, with certified logistics partners in each country.
about.check1: Exclusive selection of premium European brands
about.quote: Our mission is simple: help you drive the car of your dreams, wherever you are in the world.
about.val1Desc: Every vehicle delivered with its full history, verified service record and detailed inspection report.
about.val2Desc: A dedicated contact from first inquiry to delivery. Available 7 days a week.
about.val3Desc: Rigorous selection of high-end vehicles. We refuse any vehicle that doesn't meet our quality standards.
about.howDesc: 4 simple steps to receive your vehicle, wherever you are in the Maghreb.
about.step1Desc: Browse our online catalogue or contact us for a tailor-made selection based on your budget and criteria.
about.step2Desc: Sign the order form, secure payment. We send you all the official vehicle documents.
about.step3Desc: We handle all administrative procedures: certificate of conformity, customs clearance, local homologation.
about.step4Desc: Your vehicle is delivered to your country within the agreed timeframe. Real-time tracking available.
about.tnDesc: Delivery at the port of Tunis or Rades. Full support for ATTT homologation.
about.dzDesc: Export via the port of Algiers or Oran. DRS customs formalities management included.
about.maDesc: Delivery to Casablanca, Tangier or Agadir. Certified on-site logistics partners.
about.ctaDesc: Contact us for a personalised quote. Our team replies within 24h.
